# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

variables:
  MR_TITLE: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
  MR_DESCRIPTION: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION
  COMMIT_MESSAGE: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE

before_script:
  - echo "MR Title: $MR_TITLE"
  - echo "MR Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
  - echo "Commit Message: $COMMIT_MESSAGE"

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building with MR title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Building with commit message: $COMMIT_MESSAGE"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: test-results.xml

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Testing with MR title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Testing with MR description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: test-results.xml

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying with MR title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Deploying with commit message: $COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - |
      if [ -n "$MR_TITLE" ]; then
        TAG_NAME="release-${MR_TITLE// /-}"
        echo "Creating tag: $TAG_NAME"
        git tag "$TAG_NAME"
        git push origin "$TAG_NAME"
      fi
  only:
    - main
    - tags

notification_job:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - |
      NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE="Deployed: $MR_TITLE"
      if [ -n "$MR_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE="$NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE\nDescription: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
      fi
      echo "$NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE"
      # Send to external notification service
      curl -X POST -d "message=$NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE" $NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL
  only:
    - main
